mapper.select: SELECT * FROM movie ORDER BY play_count DESC
SELECT * FROM movie WHERE type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{type}, '%') ORDER BY play_count DESC
SELECT * FROM movie WHERE region LIKE CONCAT('%', #{region}, '%') ORDER BY play_count DESC

SELECT m.*, COUNT(pr.id) as week_play_count FROM movie m LEFT JOIN play_record pr ON m.id = pr.movie_id WHERE pr.play_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 WEEK) GROUP BY m.id ORDER BY week_play_count DESC

SELECT m.*, COUNT(pr.id) as month_play_count FROM movie m LEFT JOIN play_record pr ON m.id = pr.movie_id WHERE pr.play_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH) GROUP BY m.id ORDER BY month_play_count DESC
SELECT * FROM movie ORDER BY play_count DESC
SELECT * FROM movie ORDER BY rating DESC, rating_count DESC
SELECT m.* FROM movie m JOIN movie_actor ma ON m.id = ma.movie_id WHERE ma.actor_id = #{actorId} ORDER BY m.rating DESC
SELECT m.* FROM movie m JOIN movie_director md ON m.id = md.movie_id WHERE md.director_id = #{directorId} ORDER BY m.rating DESC
SELECT * FROM movie WHERE title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR original_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY rating DESC

SELECT m.*, COUNT(pr.id) as play_count FROM movie m LEFT JOIN play_record pr ON m.id = pr.movie_id WHERE pr.play_time >= #{startDate} AND pr.play_time <= #{endDate} GROUP BY m.id ORDER BY play_count DESC
SELECT DISTINCT type FROM movie ORDER BY type
SELECT DISTINCT region FROM movie ORDER BY region
